mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rnum, a.* FROM ( SELECT b.*, m.memberId, m.memberName FROM board2 b JOIN member m ON b.memberno = m.memberNo WHERE 1=1
AND
b.title LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' m.memberId LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' m.memberName LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%'
ORDER BY b.boardno DESC ) a ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board2 b JOIN member m ON b.memberno = m.memberNo WHERE 1=1
AND
b.title LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' m.memberId LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' m.memberName LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%'
